ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the company belongs */,
  "sub_sector" TEXT /* Sub-sector to which the company belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the company belongs */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "market_capitalization" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company (small-cap, mid-cap, large-cap) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" REAL /* Total volume of stocks traded on that date */,
  "adj_open" REAL /* Adjusted opening price for splits and dividends */,
  "adj_high" REAL /* Adjusted high price for splits and dividends */,
  "adj_low" REAL /* Adjusted low price for splits and dividends */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for splits and dividends */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount per share */,
  "split" REAL /* Split ratio (e.g., 2:1, 3:2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_info" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for trading on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was listed on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id", "exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., Quandl, Alpha Vantage) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import log entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "num_records" INTEGER /* Number of records imported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
